name: Construction machine fell on me in Boise, sue besides comp?
description: Yes, sue third parties for negligence.

mainEntity.name: Construction machine fell on me in Boise, sue besides comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue third parties for negligence.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, third-party against owner/contractor/manufacturer if negligent.** Idaho allows alongside comp, 2-year limit[2]. Comparative fault applies. Big payouts possible. Lawyer files.
